en: Hello everyone, welcome back to my channel Kanan Nair's Learning Made Easy. It's time
for YouTube Shorts. So, let's get started.
Parago, which means confused mass of objects or people, disordered mixture or confused
mixture. He told us Parago of lies.
Panacea, meaning solution for all problems. Friendship between us will be a panacea for
all our problems. It's time to say goodbye, take care, keep watching, keep learning.
